ConnectionStrings._comment: WARNING: This file may be committed to version control. For production, use environment variables or .NET User Secrets. See docs/DATABASE_SETUP.md for secure credential management.

JwtSettings._comment: HS256 symmetric signing using secret key. IMPORTANT: Change SecretKey in production and store in environment variables/Azure Key Vault. Session timeout set to 15 minutes per NFR-005. Key must be at least 256 bits (32 characters).

CorsSettings._comment: Update AllowedOrigins with actual production frontend URL. Development origins in appsettings.Development.json
